prompt: Proxmox'ta vmbr1'e bağlı VM'lerim internete çıkamıyor. IP adresi var (10.10.1.10/24) ama dışarıya ping atamıyor. Ne yapmalıyım?

assertions.description: Output includes check for IP forwarding (/proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward or sysctl)
Output includes iptables NAT table inspection command
Output identifies missing MASQUERADE rule as a likely cause
Output follows a phased troubleshoot approach (read-only first, then fix)
assertions.guidance: Check if the output separates diagnostics from fix — no destructive commands in Phase 1

assertions.description: Output includes verification commands after fix (ping, curl)
assertions.guidance: Look for ping or curl commands to verify connectivity after applying fix

assertions.description: Output does NOT apply iptables changes without presenting them to user first
assertions.guidance: The output should present diagnostic commands first, not immediately fire off iptables rules
